title: iochroma viridescens
intro: Iochroma viridescens is a flowering plant species within the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the green angel's trumpet due to its trumpet-shaped flowers that bloom in shades of green. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iochroma viridescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, and can be found in forms such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
